query_normalized: investigating neural signatures of predictive processing in visual illusions neuroscience
rationale: The paper focuses on a methodological advancement for source reconstruction in E/MEG (RAMUS) to detect deep brain activity, but it does not investigate the specific biological mechanism of "predictive processing" or the neural signatures associated with "visual illusions." While it uses E/MEG (a relevant modality), it studies somatosensory evoked potentials in a proof-of-concept simulation rather than the visual predictive coding phenomena central to the user's question, failing to meet the crit
